message:
feat(cancel): add symbol-aware cancellation subsystem

Introduce a cancellation module that integrates with the symbol-native
paradigm:
- mod.rs: public module declaration and re-exports
- symbol_cancel.rs: cancellation token and scope implementation that
  propagates cancel signals through symbol obligation chains, allowing
  in-flight RaptorQ operations to be cleanly aborted when their parent
  scope is cancelled

This enables cooperative cancellation across distributed encoding
operations without orphaning partially-encoded symbol blocks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+//! Symbol broadcast cancellation protocol.
+//!
+//! This module provides cancellation tokens, broadcast messages, and cleanup
+//! coordination for symbol stream operations. Cancellation is a protocol:
+//! it propagates correctly to stop generation, abort transmissions, clean up
+//! partial symbol sets, and notify peers.
+
+pub mod symbol_cancel;
+
+pub use symbol_cancel::{
+    CancelBroadcastMetrics, CancelBroadcaster, CancelListener, CancelMessage, CancelSink,
+    CleanupCoordinator, CleanupHandler, CleanupResult, CleanupStats, PeerId, SymbolCancelToken,
+};
